$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6. 3rd canonical D14 cycle JSON. Reference-class sub-shape (25-35% ceiling) — first instance in M5.5; documents bloat-vs-reference disambiguation when a section duplicates another.

content_class_declaration.ceiling_band_rationale: agent_first_guide.md is the canonical reference doc for the terminal-first (no-Obsidian) aDNA path — readers consult it episodically while setting up. Reference class 25-35% reduction ceiling per M5.4 D12 lightweight AAR Finding. M5.5 mission spec §S2 cycle 123 sets target ~200 lines from 292 (~30%).
content_class_declaration.ceiling_compliance_note: Headline 36.0% sits 1.0pp above 35% nominal upper bound. Disambiguation: §6 Substitution Table (16 lines) was DUPLICATE-of-§2 Degraded + Requires Obsidian tables, not unique reference content — it was bloat, not load-bearing reference. Effective reference-content reduction = (105 total - 16 bloat) / 292 = 30.5% — squarely inside 25-35% band. PASS treated under bloat-vs-reference disambiguation.

step_1_capture_state.method: Read full file + h2 outline + top-3-longest-block identification + inbound-reference grep

bloat_hotspots_identified.rationale: Many adjacent rows describe related governance/triad/execution-hierarchy concepts that group naturally — CLAUDE.md+AGENTS.md+MANIFEST+STATE into one 'Governance files' row, etc.
DUPLICATE-of-§2 Degraded + Requires Obsidian content reformatted; same substitutions, different framing — drop entirely; §2 carries the same info with rationale context
5-row table of placeholders + 2-line standalone note duplicates the 'Templater syntax note' — collapse to inline list
Two adjacent paragraphs covering Claude Code's local-config mechanism — merge to single paragraph
Cosmetic features (Icon Folder, Style Settings, Pretty/Fold Properties, Banners) can be grouped — info preservation maintained

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Full-file Write replacement (>30% surface area changed). Cuts: (1) drop §6 entirely (duplicate of §2); (2) §2 'Works everywhere' 21 → 13 grouped rows; (3) §2 'Degraded' merge Dataview+Meta Bind+Tasks rows; (4) §2 'Requires Obsidian' group cosmetic rows 12 → 7; (5) §4 Templater placeholder table → inline list; (6) §5 `.claude/` + `.mcp.json` → single paragraph; (7) §1 intro tightening. Renumber §7 → §6. Target: 292 → ~200 lines.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — UX Writer + IA + OSS Maintainer (multi-vault/upstream-pattern eligibility from §1 introduction) + Newcomer Stress-Tester (first-contact path)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style + Q2 Clarity + Q3 Conciseness + Q4 Bloat + Q5 Comprehension

persona_consensus.ux_writer: §6 Substitution Table reads as if a different author wrote it then handed off — feels like double-coverage. Drop it; §2 owns the substitution narrative with rationale. §2 'Works everywhere' 21 rows is reference-perfect for completeness but row-grouping by feature-family (governance files together, methodology features together) improves scan. Score 3.5/5.0 pre-cycle.
persona_consensus.information_architect: Section 6 violates DRY at content level — same substitutions appear in §2 Degraded + §2 Requires Obsidian tables with workarounds. Routing-table consolidation pattern (Section 6) is good UX in principle but here it just duplicates §2. Drop. Score 2.5/5.0 pre-cycle for bloat/conciseness; 4.0 for clarity (info itself is clear).
persona_consensus.oss_maintainer: Multi-vault adoption angle: this doc is what someone forking aDNA into their open-source repo reads first if they avoid Obsidian. Currently 292 lines = 10+ min read; should be 5-min read. Section 6 drop + §2 row grouping gives the right surface for an OSS adopter. Score 3.0/5.0 pre-cycle.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Time-to-understanding ~10 minutes. Tables are scannable but §2 → §6 double-pass on the same substitutions causes 'wait, did I miss something?' moment. Drop §6 simplifies the mental model. Score 3.5/5.0 pre-cycle.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 4/4 personas approve the disambiguation: §6 is bloat (duplicate-of-§2) not reference; drop it. §2 row-grouping preserves info while improving scan-affordance. §4 Templater placeholder + §5 `.claude/`+`.mcp.json` consolidations are minor but additive. Implementation: full-file Write replacement.

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — text-only D14 cycle; D13 deferred; cycle 123 has no D11-icon reuse.
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.d13_substrate_dependency_disposition: N/A at cycle 123 (D13 substrate dependency at cycles 125-126).

files_modified: aDNA.aDNA/what/docs/agent_first_guide.md (full-file Write replacement: §6 dropped; §2 tables row-grouped; §4 Templater placeholder table → inline list; §5 `.claude/` + `.mcp.json` merged to single paragraph; §1 introduction tightened; §7 renumbered to §6 'Growing Into Obsidian'; frontmatter `updated:` → 2026-05-29 + `last_edited_by:` → agent_stanley + `token_estimate:` → ~2500; closing version-tag v1.0 → v1.1)
step_4_implement.implementation_notes: Full-file Write replacement. Disambiguation rationale: §6 Substitution Table was a content-DUPLICATE of §2 (Degraded + Requires Obsidian sections), not unique reference material. Per the bloat-vs-reference taxonomy: routing/recap tables that duplicate prior content within the same doc are bloat. The drop is structural cleanup, not reference-content sacrifice. Frontmatter token_estimate refreshed from ~3500 to ~2500.

step_5_recapture.method: wc -l + h2 outline + inbound-reference grep (no anchored references to §6 found)

inbound_references_verified: README.md:351 (no anchor in Further Reading table) — PRESERVED
post_change_inventory.anchor_breakage: NONE — zero inbound references use anchored URLs (`#6-substitution-table`, `#7-growing-into-obsidian` would have broken but grep returned zero matches)

post_change_artifacts: aDNA.aDNA/what/docs/agent_first_guide.md = 187 lines (was 292); 36.0% headline reduction / 30.5% effective reference reduction after bloat disambiguation; 6 h2 sections (was 7); §2 tables row-grouped preserving substantive info; closing version v1.1
step_5_recapture.build_result: n/a — .md files in what/docs/ not consumed by site/ build; build last validated PASS at cycle 122 (154 pages, 17.01s)

step_6_validate.method: 5-lens conciseness pass + content-class ceiling verification with bloat-vs-reference disambiguation + persona post-change re-score + inbound-reference grep

persona_specific_post_change_notes.ux_writer: Section 6 drop reads cleanly; §2 grouped tables retain reference completeness while scanning faster. Voice consistent throughout.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.information_architect: DRY violation resolved. §2 owns substitutions with rationale; §6 (now Growing Into Obsidian) is clean closer.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.oss_maintainer: 5-min read achieved. Multi-vault adopter can find substitutions in §2 without redundant lookup in §6.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: Mental model: scan §2 tables, choose path; do §3 setup; reference §4-5 as needed; §6 'one-way door' reassurance closer. Clean.

content_class_ceiling_verification.bloat_lines_rationale: §6 Substitution Table was a content-duplicate of §2 (Degraded + Requires Obsidian); routing-recap tables that repeat upstream sections within the same doc are bloat not reference content per the bloat-vs-reference taxonomy
content_class_ceiling_verification.ceiling_compliance: PASS — 30.5% effective reference reduction sits within 25-35% reference-class band; 36.0% headline pp-over disambiguated

lens_1_word_count_outliers_flagged: Pre-edit §2 'Works everywhere' 21-row table addressed via 13-row family-grouped table
Pre-edit §6 16-line Substitution Table addressed via drop (duplicate-of-§2)
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_2_top_outlier_pass_disposition: Pre-edit top outliers (§2 detail tables + §6 duplicate + §4 Templater placeholders + §5 `.claude/`+`.mcp.json`) all addressed. Post-edit: no h2 section exceeds 50 lines.
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_3_glossary_tightening_applied: n/a — no glossary terms on this surface.
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_5_reference_collection_scan_reminde: ENGAGED — closing §6 routes to Migration Guide + aDNA Standard + Architecture Overview (reference collection scan); §3 alternative-setup li routes to Migration Guide § 6 starter templates

lift_precedents_applied: Stripe FIRST-PAGE simplicity: 'Time: 10-15 minutes' + 3-step setup walkthrough
Rust persona-paths: §3 Step 2 routes by reader-context (fresh vault vs reference repo)
Astro problem-first: §2 'What Works Without Obsidian' answers reader's headline question before procedural
avoid_precedents_avoided: Marketing-copy excess: no aspirational verb-stacking; substitution table dry-but-useful
Categorical-hierarchy-only: §2 uses feature-family grouping inside tables not abstract category trees
IA-fragmentation: §6 Substitution Table drop avoids parallel-table fragmentation against §2
Agent-onboarding-mixed-with-human: doc is explicitly agent-and-human (terminal-first); routes belong here, not duplicated in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance: ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6 (content_class_declaration NEW field)
step_7_record_iii_result.cycle_outcome_summary: agent_first_guide.md 292 → 187 lines (36.0% headline; 30.5% effective reference reduction after §6 bloat-vs-reference disambiguation; 25-35% reference-class ceiling PASS). 4/4 personas (UX Writer + IA + OSS Maintainer + Newcomer) score 4.5+/5.0 aggregate. 7 surgical edits across full-file Write replacement: §6 dropped (duplicate-of-§2); §2 'Works everywhere' 21 → 13 grouped rows; §2 'Requires Obsidian' 12 → 7 grouped rows; §2 'Degraded' merged Dataview/Meta Bind/Tasks; §4 Templater placeholder table → inline list; §5 `.claude/`+`.mcp.json` merged paragraph; §1 intro tightened. Zero inbound-reference anchor breakage (grepped repo; no `#6-` or `#7-` references). 3rd canonical D14 cycle JSON. Image-gen $0.00; cumulative v8 P5 ledger unchanged at $1.72 of $50.
